areas.description: The dusk sand-sea: one endless mood seen wide then close. A high open crest and a sheltered windless hollow, threaded by a single descend/climb path. Saffron-glow above, faded-rose in the lee.

pathExperience.description: Sand drifts off the crest-edge as Cosmo crosses; the wind narrows to a hush as the world cups around him.
